---
name: Exercise Clarification Request
about: Ask a question or request clarification about specific module exercises, READMEs, or concepts.
title: "[CLARIFICATION] "
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

**What concept/exercise needs clarification?**
A clear description of what is ambiguous or difficult to understand.

**Module Context**
Name of the module and exercise file (e.g. `05_eval_basics/exercises.md`).

**What did you try?**
Briefly describe your understanding or what code you wrote that prompted this question.

**Proposed Clarification**
If you have a suggestion on how to improve the README or guides to make it clearer for future cohorts, write it here!
